model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible + dida + age + C(sex) + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['weight']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
sample_selection: citizen == 3 (not a citizen; proxy for undocumented status)
(yrimmig - birthyr) < 16 (arrived in the US before age 16; key DACA criterion)
year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre- and post-DACA; 2012 excluded as transition year)
